{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65014", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-306", "name": "Missing Authentication for Critical Function"}], "description": "## Impact
The `DELETE /${restEndpoint}/test-webhook/:id` route is registered before the authentication middleware is applied, allowing any unauthenticated network caller who knows a workflow ID to cancel that workflow's active test webhook registration. 

The impact is limited to disrupting in-progress test sessions. Production webhooks, persistent workflow state, and stored data are not affected.

## Patches
Users should upgrade to the patched version once available to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict network access to the n8n instance to fully trusted users only.
- Place the n8n instance behind a reverse proxy or firewall that requires authentication before reaching the REST API.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:36:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65014"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:36:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65014", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.27.4", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.28.0", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-authentication-bypass-via-test-webhook", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Unauthenticated Endpoint Allows Cancellation of Any User's Active Test Webhook", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:36:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-33q9-f52j-gc75", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.27.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.27.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Unauthenticated Endpoint Allows Cancellation of Any User's Active Test Webhook
